'''âz-f-n''' ('''zafana''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|stative verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:tweague|tweague]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| z-f-n
|-
! Word class
| [[Stative verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:tweague|tweague]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âz-f-n
|-
! Lemma
| zafana
|}

== [[Patient]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:zafanithi|zafanithi]] || [[word:zafaniji|zafaniji]] || [[word:zafanishi|zafanishi]] || [[word:zafani|zafani]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:zafanuthuth|zafanuthuth]] || [[word:zafanujuj|zafanujuj]] || [[word:zafanushush|zafanushush]] || [[word:zafan|zafan]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:zafanuthu|zafanuthu]] || [[word:zafanuju|zafanuju]] || [[word:zafanushu|zafanushu]] || [[word:zafanu|zafanu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:zafanufuth|zafanufuth]] || [[word:zafanufuj|zafanufuj]] || [[word:zafanufush|zafanufush]] || [[word:zafanuf|zafanuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:zafanethe|zafanethe]] || [[word:zafaneje|zafaneje]] || [[word:zafaneshe|zafaneshe]] || [[word:zafane|zafane]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:zafanothoth|zafanothoth]] || [[word:zafanojoj|zafanojoj]] || [[word:zafanoshosh|zafanoshosh]] || [[word:zafan|zafan]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:zafanotho|zafanotho]] || [[word:zafanojo|zafanojo]] || [[word:zafanosho|zafanosho]] || [[word:zafano|zafano]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:zafanofoth|zafanofoth]] || [[word:zafanofoj|zafanofoj]] || [[word:zafanofosh|zafanofosh]] || [[word:zafanof|zafanof]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:zafanĂŻf|zafanĂŻf]] || [[word:zafanĂŻf|zafanĂŻf]] || [[word:zafanĂŻf|zafanĂŻf]] || [[word:zafanĂŻf|zafanĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:zafanĂŻfĂŻf|zafanĂŻfĂŻf]] || [[word:zafanĂŻfĂŻf|zafanĂŻfĂŻf]] || [[word:zafanĂŻfĂŻf|zafanĂŻfĂŻf]] || [[word:zafanĂŻfĂŻf|zafanĂŻfĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:zafanĂŻf|zafanĂŻf]] || [[word:zafanĂŻf|zafanĂŻf]] || [[word:zafanĂŻf|zafanĂŻf]] || [[word:zafanĂŻf|zafanĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:zafanĂŻf|zafanĂŻf]] || [[word:zafanĂŻf|zafanĂŻf]] || [[word:zafanĂŻf|zafanĂŻf]] || [[word:zafanĂŻf|zafanĂŻf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:zafanĂŠthĂŠ|zafanĂŠthĂŠ]] || [[word:zafanĂŠjĂŠ|zafanĂŠjĂŠ]] || [[word:zafanĂŠshĂŠ|zafanĂŠshĂŠ]] || [[word:zafanĂŠ|zafanĂŠ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:zafanathath|zafanathath]] || [[word:zafanajaj|zafanajaj]] || [[word:zafanashash|zafanashash]] || [[word:zafan|zafan]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:zafanatha|zafanatha]] || [[word:zafanaja|zafanaja]] || [[word:zafanasha|zafanasha]] || [[word:zafana|zafana]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:zafanafath|zafanafath]] || [[word:zafanafaj|zafanafaj]] || [[word:zafanafash|zafanafash]] || [[word:zafanaf|zafanaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[stative]].none || [[word:zafanasha|zafanasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:gozafanasha|gozafanasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokizafanasha|gokizafanasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]] || [[word:zafannĂŒsha|zafannĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:gozafannknĂŒsha|gozafannknĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokizafannĂŒsha|gokizafannĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:zafanshĂ«sha|zafanshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gozafannkshĂ«sha|gozafannkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokizafanshĂ«sha|gokizafanshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:zafanrosha|zafanrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gozafannkrosha|gozafannkrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokizafanrosha|gokizafanrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:zafanmusha|zafanmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gozafannkmusha|gozafannkmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokizafanmusha|gokizafanmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[mythical]] || [[word:zafansherasha|zafansherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gozafannksherasha|gozafannksherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokizafansherasha|gokizafansherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[intention]] || [[word:zafanngasha|zafanngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gozafannkngasha|gozafannkngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokizafanngasha|gokizafanngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[optative]] || [[word:zafanyasha|zafanyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gozafannkyasha|gozafannkyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokizafanyasha|gokizafanyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:zafanyamasha|zafanyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gozafannkyamasha|gozafannkyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokizafanyamasha|gokizafanyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:zafannĂŒshĂ«sha|zafannĂŒshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gozafannknĂŒshĂ«sha|gozafannknĂŒshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokizafannĂŒshĂ«sha|gokizafannĂŒshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:zafannĂŒrosha|zafannĂŒrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gozafannknĂŒrosha|gozafannknĂŒrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokizafannĂŒrosha|gokizafannĂŒrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:zafannĂŒmusha|zafannĂŒmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gozafannknĂŒmusha|gozafannknĂŒmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokizafannĂŒmusha|gokizafannĂŒmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:zafanshĂ«nĂŒsha|zafanshĂ«nĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gozafannkshĂ«nĂŒsha|gozafannkshĂ«nĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokizafanshĂ«nĂŒsha|gokizafanshĂ«nĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:zafanshĂ«rosha|zafanshĂ«rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gozafannkshĂ«rosha|gozafannkshĂ«rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokizafanshĂ«rosha|gokizafanshĂ«rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:zafanshĂ«musha|zafanshĂ«musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gozafannkshĂ«musha|gozafannkshĂ«musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokizafanshĂ«musha|gokizafanshĂ«musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:zafanronĂŒsha|zafanronĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gozafannkronĂŒsha|gozafannkronĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokizafanronĂŒsha|gokizafanronĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:zafanroshĂ«sha|zafanroshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gozafannkroshĂ«sha|gozafannkroshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokizafanroshĂ«sha|gokizafanroshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:zafanromusha|zafanromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gozafannkromusha|gozafannkromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokizafanromusha|gokizafanromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:zafanmunĂŒsha|zafanmunĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gozafannkmunĂŒsha|gozafannkmunĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokizafanmunĂŒsha|gokizafanmunĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:zafanmushĂ«sha|zafanmushĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gozafannkmushĂ«sha|gozafannkmushĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokizafanmushĂ«sha|gokizafanmushĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:zafanmurosha|zafanmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gozafannkmurosha|gozafannkmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokizafanmurosha|gokizafanmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none || [[word:zafan|zafan]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none_[[gnomic]] || [[word:zĂŠfĂŠn|zĂŠfĂŠn]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]] || [[word:hozafan|hozafan]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:hozĂŠfĂŠn|hozĂŠfĂŠn]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:hohozafan|hohozafan]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:hohozĂŠfĂŠn|hohozĂŠfĂŠn]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]] || [[word:nĂŒzafan|nĂŒzafan]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:nĂŒzĂŠfĂŠn|nĂŒzĂŠfĂŠn]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:nĂŒnĂŒzafan|nĂŒnĂŒzafan]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:nĂŒnĂŒzĂŠfĂŠn|nĂŒnĂŒzĂŠfĂŠn]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]] || [[word:nĂŻzafan|nĂŻzafan]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:nĂŻzĂŠfĂŠn|nĂŻzĂŠfĂŠn]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:nĂŻnĂŻzafan|nĂŻnĂŻzafan]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:nĂŻnĂŻzĂŠfĂŠn|nĂŻnĂŻzĂŠfĂŠn]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]] || [[word:luzafan|luzafan]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:luzĂŠfĂŠn|luzĂŠfĂŠn]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:luluzafan|luluzafan]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:luluzĂŠfĂŠn|luluzĂŠfĂŠn]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]] || [[word:lizafan|lizafan]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:lizĂŠfĂŠn|lizĂŠfĂŠn]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lilizafan|lilizafan]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lilizĂŠfĂŠn|lilizĂŠfĂŠn]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]] || [[word:kozafan|kozafan]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:kozĂŠfĂŠn|kozĂŠfĂŠn]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kokozafan|kokozafan]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kokozĂŠfĂŠn|kokozĂŠfĂŠn]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]] || [[word:kezafan|kezafan]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:kezĂŠfĂŠn|kezĂŠfĂŠn]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kekezafan|kekezafan]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kekezĂŠfĂŠn|kekezĂŠfĂŠn]]
|}

''93 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki verbs]]
[[Category:Aelaki stative verbs]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|d414c41}}
